data.title: Online Pet Store | Dog, Cat & Pet Supplies Shop | UK
data.metaDescription: Welcome to the Real Pet Store! Looking for a great deal on pet supplies? Want to pamper your best pet pal? Look no further! We stock equipment and accessories for dogs, cats and furries plus a vast range of consumables for home delivery! Our Online Pet Store stocks all the major pet brands at the best prices online!
h1s: Online Pet Supplies: Get Your Hands on the Best Deals
data.ogTitle: Online Pet Store | Dog, Cat & Pet Supplies Shop | UK

We stock equipment and accessories for dogs, cats and furries plus a vast range of consumables for home delivery! Our Online Pet Store stocks all the major pet brands at the best prices online!

issues.impact: Google truncates long descriptions. Your call-to-action is probably getting cut off.
issues.fix: Trim to 150-160 characters. Put the most important info first.

issues.impact: Invisible to screen readers and search engines. You're losing Google Images traffic.
issues.fix: Add descriptive alt text to every image. Be specific, include keywords where natural.

issues.impact: Slow load times = higher bounce rates. Mobile users are leaving before your page loads.
issues.fix: Compress images, minify CSS/JS, enable gzip compression. Target under 500KB.

summary: We analyzed realpetstore.co.uk and found 3 issues affecting your search visibility and conversions. The biggest opportunities are fixing your meta tags, improving mobile optimization, and adding structured data for rich snippets. These changes could significantly increase your organic traffic within 30-60 days.
